dropzone.title: Drop a card or box file
dropzone.description: Drop a .card or .box file into this window or choose one with the action button. The viewer switches to the corresponding full-window mode after import.

viewer.cardFatalError: A fatal error occurred while rendering the card.
viewer.cardRenderError: Failed to render the card window.
viewer.boxContainerError: The box layout container is unavailable.
viewer.boxRenderError: Failed to render the box layout.

errors.hostActionFailed: The action failed. Check Host logs and the bridge chain.
errors.resourceOpenFailed: The selected resource could not be opened through the official route. Check the handler plugins and Host logs.
